# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: localhost
    port: 8080
    path: /user
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    plugins:
      - key-auth

  - name: product-service
    host: localhost
    port: 8081
    path: /product
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    plugins:
      - key-auth

routes:
  - name: user-route
    hosts:
      - example.com
    paths:
      - /user
    service:
      name: user-service
      loadbalancer:
        algorithm: round-robin
        healthy-upstream-count: 2
        unhealthy-upstream-count: 1

  - name: product-route
    hosts:
      - example.com
    paths:
      - /product
    service:
      name: product-service
      loadbalancer:
        algorithm: round-robin
        healthy-upstream-count: 2
        unhealthy-upstream-count: 1

upstreams:
  user-upstream:
    nodes:
      - hostname: localhost
        port: 8080

  product-upstream:
    nodes:
      - hostname: localhost
        port: 8081

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
